files=sorted(l for l in r.stdout.splitlines() if l.strip())
assert files==['.github/hooks/session-end.json','.gitignore','artifacts/evidence/test-results/receipt-copilot-hook-predelete-20260712.json'], files
h=subprocess.run(['git','log','--oneline','-1','--','.github/hooks/session-end.json'],capture_output=True,text=True)
assert h.stdout.strip()
f7=open('governance_tools/f7_full_update.py',encoding='utf-8').read()
